title: デビュー戦の後に・2人だけの船出

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
S-so, how'd I do, Trainer? I think I moved pretty
well out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Or maybe... I'm completely wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Woo! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Now I can finally report some good news to my
Mejiro fam!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Grandma expects me to enter the Classics fast,
but at least I can tell her that I made my debut for
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While still far from meeting all her grandmother's
expectations, this is a big first step.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you too, Ines. It's all because I had your
support!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. Don't worry about me. I'm your
trusty sidekick after all!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Well, see ya!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where ya going, Ines?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I have to get ready for my own debut race, just
like you did.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I may not be in the Mejiro family, but your
roommate has her own humble life. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
The story will continue tonight, when I get back
to the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And off she goes... Now it's just the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I feel a little lonely...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But you'll always be with me, won't you? Friends
forever, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What a relief. I'm still a newbie, but I'm looking
forward to a long relationship!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. Why'd I say it like that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
"A long relationship"? That sounds like... oh
gosh... like we're newlyweds!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Please forget what I just said! Anyway, I'll keep
doing my best in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan makes it through her debut safely,
but her next race will be a true test of her
strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I settle on the Junior Cup as our next goal. She
needs to make a name for herself in an early-year
open race to move on to the Classics.
